title: Figure 2b from: Kim K, Park J-H (2026) Typhoon Khanun-driven stormwater runoff enhances the detection of terrestrial mammalian environmental DNA in a forest stream. Biodiversity Data Journal 14: e194007. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.14.e194007

description: Figure 2b Agarose gel electrophoresis of PCR products targeting mammalian mitochondrial 12S rDNA: - Samples collected during typhoon-induced runoff (10-11 August 2023) at Sites 1′ and 5′ showing successful amplification of mammalian eDNA.
